note: First run via RecallBench. Ported all v4 prompt engineering (type-specific generation, extraction-aware judging, self-verification for multi-session + knowledge-update, preference few-shots, lenient abstention). Validates RecallBench produces equivalent results to the original in-repo femind harness. Score: 96.0% — slightly exceeds v4 (95.6%) due to LLM nondeterminism.
